name: Senescent-cell and SASP-related biomarkers in diabetic kidney disease
summary: Human biomarker outcome assessing adipose and skin senescent-cell markers, macrophage/crown-like structure markers, and circulating SASP factors before and 11 days after a 3-day dasatinib plus quercetin course.
measurement_method: Adipose tissue and skin p16INK4A, p21CIP1, senescence-associated beta-galactosidase, adipocyte progenitor, macrophage/crown-like structure, and circulating SASP-factor assessment
timepoint: Before treatment and 11 days after completing a 3-day D+Q course

provenance.locator: PubMed PMID 31542391 abstract METHODS and FINDINGS
provenance.note: Abstract identifies adipose tissue, skin biopsies, blood, senescent-cell markers, macrophage/crown-like structures, and circulating SASP factors as measured endpoints.
